title: fix(core): properly merge fragmented tool_call_chunks in AIMessageChunk
body_text:
## 问题

根据 issue #35514，某些提供商（如 OpenRouter 配合 deepseek/deepseek-v3.2）在流式传输工具调用时，会将参数分散在多个 SSE 分片中。这导致工具在参数不完整时就被执行。

## 修复

1. **`init_tool_calls()` 方法** - 按 `id` 分组 `tool_call_chunks`，合并参数后再解析 JSON

2. **`add_ai_message_chunks()` 函数** - 合并多个 AIMessageChunk 时，也按 `id` 分组合并 `tool_call_chunks`

3. **单元测试** - 添加了针对 SSE 分片场景的测试用例

## 测试场景

- 单个工具调用的参数分片
- 多个工具调用的分片
- 合并后的完整参数验证

Fixes #35514

entities.name: AIMessageChunk
entities.description: A data structure in which fragmented tool call chunks need to be properly merged.

entities.name: Fragmented Tool Call Chunks
entities.description: Tool call parameters that are split across multiple Server-Sent Events (SSE) chunks.

entities.name: OpenRouter
entities.description: A provider that, when combined with Deepseek-v3.2, can cause fragmented tool call chunks.

entities.name: Deepseek-v3.2
entities.description: A model from Deepseek mentioned as exhibiting the issue when used with OpenRouter.

entities.name: Streaming Tool Calls
entities.description: The process of transmitting tool calls in a continuous stream, where fragmentation can occur.

entities.name: Premature Tool Execution
entities.description: The issue of tools being executed with incomplete parameters due to fragmentation.

entities.name: init_tool_calls() Method
entities.description: A method modified to group and merge tool call chunks by ID before JSON parsing.

entities.name: add_ai_message_chunks() Function
entities.description: A function modified to merge tool call chunks by ID when combining multiple AIMessageChunks.

entities.name: SSE Chunks
entities.description: Server-Sent Events chunks, which are the medium through which tool call parameters are fragmented.

entities.name: Issue #35514
entities.description: An existing GitHub issue that describes the problem of fragmented tool call chunks.

entities.name: Unit Tests
entities.description: Tests added to cover scenarios involving fragmented tool call parameters.

entities.name: Tool Call Chunks
entities.description: Segments of tool call parameters that can become fragmented during streaming.

extracted_data.summary: This issue fixes a bug where tool call parameters are fragmented across SSE chunks by providers like OpenRouter with Deepseek-v3.2 during streaming, leading to premature tool execution, by properly merging these chunks within AIMessageChunk using the `init_tool_calls()` method and `add_ai_message_chunks()` function, and includes new unit tests.
